rawIntent: Add a trimEnd utility at src/shared/utils/trim-end/trimEnd.ts that trims trailing whitespace from a string

successCriteria.description: The trimEnd utility correctly trims trailing whitespace from a string.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record.
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline.
Input validated at the API boundary.
outOfScope: Any other utilities or files outside src/shared/utils/trim-end/trimEnd.ts
